docs.title: pairs-trading
docs.text:
Production-grade pairs trading via cointegration with walk-forward evaluation.

This page is a placeholder. The full methodology, motivation, limitations, and reference material are owned by the documentation agent and will land in a subsequent change.

docs.title: Getting started
docs.text: This page is a placeholder. Installation walkthroughs, example notebooks, and tutorial content are owned by the documentation agent.

docs.title: Reproducibility
docs.text: This page is a placeholder. Detailed reproducibility guarantees, manifest schema, dependency pinning policy, and the canonical workflow for re-running a historical study are owned by the documentation agent.

docs.title: Building blocks
docs.text:
• pairs.RunManifest captures git revision, dependency versions, config hash, and seed for every run.
  • pairs.default_rng and pairs.derive_rng produce deterministic NumPy generators.
  • scripts/check_reproducibility.py re-hashes a stored configuration and asserts it matches the digest recorded in a manifest.
